summary: First voice check-in. Anna expressed wish to remain at home, mentioned Henk, described morning tea ritual.
Anna described washing preferences: start with left arm, hum during washing. Mentioned sleep difficulties starting.
Anna mentioned Henk again. Discussed her cat Miep and hearing on her left side. Referenced Riet (sister).
Anna described morning bird-watching. Positive experience with caregiver singing 'Tulpen uit Amsterdam' during washing.
Anna expressed end-of-life wish to die at home. Reported ongoing sleep difficulties. Miep mentioned as morning anchor.
